{"code":"(def in-progress-issues (filter (fn [issue] (= (:state issue) "in_progress")) (tables :linear_issues)))
(def grouped (group-by :assignee_login in-progress-issues))
(def counts (map (fn [[login issues]] [login (count issues)]) grouped))
(max-key second counts)"}
